name: get_instructor_weekly_timetable
script:
instructor = frappe.form_dict.get("instructor")
week_start = frappe.form_dict.get("week_start")

if not instructor or not week_start:
    frappe.response["message"] = []
else:
    start_date = frappe.utils.getdate(week_start)
    end_date = frappe.utils.add_days(start_date, 5)

    records = frappe.get_all("Course Schedule",
        filters={
            "instructor": instructor,
            "schedule_date": ["between", [start_date, end_date]]
        },
        fields=["schedule_date", "from_time", "to_time", "course", "room", "student_group"],
        order_by="schedule_date, from_time"
    )

    result = []
    for r in records:
        f_seconds = int(r.from_time.total_seconds())
        t_seconds = int(r.to_time.total_seconds())
        f_str = str(f_seconds // 3600).zfill(2) + ":" + str((f_seconds % 3600) // 60).zfill(2)
        t_str = str(t_seconds // 3600).zfill(2) + ":" + str((t_seconds % 3600) // 60).zfill(2)
        result.append({
            "date": str(r.schedule_date),
            "from_time": f_str,
            "to_time": t_str,
            "course": r.course,
            "room": r.room,
            "student_group": r.student_group
        })

    frappe.response["message"] = result
